signals.headline: Russia and Ukraine agreed to a 32-hour ceasefire for Orthodox Easter, from 16:00 on April 11 until the end of April 12,
signals.raw:
Russia and Ukraine agreed to a 32-hour ceasefire for Orthodox Easter, from 16:00 on April 11 until the end of April 12, 2026.** | YES | HIGH confidence[1][2][4][5]

Russia's Kremlin announced the unilateral pause by Putin, expecting Ukraine to reciprocate, after Zelenskiy proposed it via the US; Zelenskiy confirmed Ukraine would act symmetrically for a "real progress toward peace."[1][2][5]

signals.headline: Trump Nominates Kevin Warsh as Next Fed Chair, Signaling Potential Shift in Inflation Policy and Rate Cuts** | **YES** |
signals.raw:
Trump Nominates Kevin Warsh as Next Fed Chair, Signaling Potential Shift in Inflation Policy and Rate Cuts** | **YES** | **HIGH** confidence[1][2][3]

President Trump announced on January 30, 2026, his nomination of Kevin Warsh—former Fed governor and inflation hawk—to succeed Jerome Powell as Fed Chair when Powell's term ends in mid-May 2026[2][3]. This development, amid persistent ~3% inflation,
